'''Hijarna''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located near or in [[Orus sector/Legends|Orus sector]], within the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The planet was once part of the [[Rakata/Legends|Rakatan]] [[Infinite Empire/Legends|Infinite Empire]], and was discovered by the [[Fifth Alderaanian Expedition]], which also discovered the one thousand-year old remains of an [[Unidentified Hijarna species|ancient civilization]]. The civilization had fallen to alien invaders. Their last stronghold was the [[Fortress of Hijarna]], made of what was dubbed [[Hijarna stone]], similar to the [[Hand of Thrawn]] on [[Nirauan/Legends|Nirauan]]. The Fortress was used as a rendezvous by [[Talon Karrde]]'s organization. Karrde assembled the leaders of the [[Smugglers' Alliance]] at the Fortress to plan locating the [[crystal gravfield trap]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] had set for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. At the assembly, [[Niles Ferrier]] was revealed as a traitor.

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Vision of the Future]]'' it is incorrectly spelled "Hijama."
